{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:A/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-347", "name": "Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-353", "name": "Missing Support for Integrity Check"}], "description": "### Impact

The experimental `Chacha20Poly1305` key-encryption algorithm generates the 16-byte Poly1305 authentication tag during `encryptKey()` but **discards it**: the tag is never written to the header and therefore never reaches the wire. On the receiving side, `decryptKey()` calls `openssl_decrypt('chacha20-poly1305', ...)` **without the tag argument**, which makes OpenSSL skip authentication entirely.

As a result the AEAD construction is silently degraded to unauthenticated ChaCha20: a tampered encrypted CEK is accepted, and because ChaCha20 is a stream cipher, a single-byte change in the ciphertext propagates as a single-byte change in the recovered CEK with no integrity check (CWE-353 / CWE-347). An attacker on the token path can manipulate the wrapped key without detection.

### Affected configurations

Applications that register `Jose\Experimental\KeyEncryption\Chacha20Poly1305` (package `web-token/jwt-experimental`) as a JWE `alg`.

### Patches

`encryptKey()` now publishes the Poly1305 tag as the base64url `tag` header parameter (and asserts it is 16 bytes). `decryptKey()` requires the `tag` header, validates its length, and passes it to `openssl_decrypt()` so the tag is actually verified, in line with RFC 7539 / RFC 8439. Tampering now results in a decryption failure.

> Note: this changes the wire format of tokens produced with this experimental algorithm (a `tag` header is now emitted and required).

### Workarounds

Do not use the experimental `Chacha20Poly1305` key-encryption algorithm for untrusted input until upgraded.

### References

- RFC 7539 / RFC 8439 (ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD)
- CWE-353: Missing Support for Integrity Check

## Résolution

Un correctif a été préparé sur une branche dédiée basée sur `3.4.x`, avec des tests anti-régression dédiés (fork privé temporaire de cette advisory, PR #1).

**ChaCha20-Poly1305** — le tag d'authentification Poly1305 est désormais publié dans le header au chiffrement et vérifié au déchiffrement (RFC 7539), rétablissant l'intégrité AEAD.

**Validation :** `php -l` OK, PHPUnit vert, aucune nouvelle erreur PHPStan introduite (différentiel nul vs `3.4.x`), aucun commentaire ajouté dans le code source. Après merge, cascade prévue `3.4.x → 4.0.x → 4.1.x`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T21:08:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T21:08:15Z", "references": ["https://github.com/web-token/jwt-framework/security/advisories/GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/web-token/jwt-library/GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/web-token/jwt-framework/security-advisories/GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/web-token/jwt-framework", "summary": "PHP JWT Framework: Chacha20Poly1305 key-encryption algorithm discards the Poly1305 authentication tag, performing no authentication on decryption", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T21:08:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6vvh-pxr4-25r7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "web-token/jwt-experimental"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.6"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "web-token/jwt-library"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.4.10"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.0.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "web-token/jwt-library"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.0.7"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "web-token/jwt-library"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.1.0, < 4.1.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: PHP JWT Framework: Chacha20Poly1305 key-encryption algorithm discards the Poly1305 authentication tag, performing no authentication on decryption
